rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer And Ntc Of Hearing On Demurrer To The First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 13, 2007, LINE 1 RESPONDENT ANTHONY SPAVONE, COLLETTE SCAFANI'S Demurrer And Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To The First Amended Petition IS CONTINUED TO MAY 2, 2007 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. =(302/PJM/JU)
